entries.original: Added `ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER` environment variable to select a Bedrock service tier (`default`, `flex`, or `priority`), sent as the `X-Amzn-Bedrock-Service-Tier` header
entries.translated: Bedrock 서비스 티어(`default`, `flex`, `priority`)를 선택할 수 있는 `ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER` 환경 변수 추가 (`X-Amzn-Bedrock-Service-Tier` 헤더로 전송됨)

entries.original: Pasting a PR URL into the `/resume` search box now finds the session that created that PR (GitHub, GitHub Enterprise, GitLab, and Bitbucket)
entries.translated: `/resume` 검색창에 PR URL을 붙여넣으면 해당 PR을 생성한 세션을 찾을 수 있도록 개선 (GitHub, GitHub Enterprise, GitLab, Bitbucket 지원)

entries.original: `/mcp` now shows claude.ai connectors hidden by a manually-added server with the same URL, with a hint to remove the duplicate
entries.translated: `/mcp` 명령 시 동일한 URL로 수동 추가된 서버에 의해 가려졌던 claude.ai 커넥터를 표시하고, 중복 제거 힌트 제공

entries.original: Clarified the `/mcp` message shown when an MCP server is still unauthorized after the browser sign-in flow
entries.translated: 브라우저 로그인 후에도 MCP 서버가 여전히 인증되지 않은 경우 표시되는 `/mcp` 메시지 명확화

entries.original: OpenTelemetry: numeric attributes on `api_request`/`api_error` log events are now emitted as numbers, not strings
entries.translated: OpenTelemetry: `api_request`/`api_error` 로그 이벤트의 숫자 속성이 문자열이 아닌 숫자로 출력되도록 수정

entries.original: OpenTelemetry: added `claude_code.at_mention` log event for `@`-mention resolution
entries.translated: OpenTelemetry: `@` 멘션 해석을 위한 `claude_code.at_mention` 로그 이벤트 추가

entries.original: Fixed `/branch` producing forks that fail with "tool_use ids were found without tool_result blocks" when the source session contained entries from rewound timelines
entries.translated: 소스 세션에 되감기된 타임라인의 항목이 포함된 경우, `/branch`로 생성된 포크에서 "tool_use ids were found without tool_result blocks" 오류가 발생하며 실패하던 문제 해결

entries.original: Fixed `/model` not showing the Effort option for Bedrock application inference profile ARNs, and those ARNs not receiving `output_config.effort`
Fixed Vertex AI / Bedrock returning `invalid_request_error: output_config: Extra inputs are not permitted` on session-title generation and other structured-output queries
entries.translated: Fixed Vertex AI / Bedrock returning `invalid_request_error: output_config: Extra inputs are not permitted` on session-title generation and other structured-output queries

entries.original: Fixed Vertex AI `count_tokens` endpoint returning 400 errors for users behind proxy gateways
entries.translated: Fixed Vertex AI `count_tokens` endpoint returning 400 errors for users behind proxy gateways

entries.original: Fixed `spinnerTipsOverride.excludeDefault` not suppressing the time-based spinner tips
entries.translated: Fixed `spinnerTipsOverride.excludeDefault` not suppressing the time-based spinner tips

entries.original: Fixed ToolSearch missing MCP tools that connected after session start in nonblocking mode
entries.translated: Fixed ToolSearch missing MCP tools that connected after session start in nonblocking mode

entries.original: Fixed `!exit` / `!quit` in bash mode terminating the CLI instead of running as a shell command
entries.translated: Fixed `!exit` / `!quit` in bash mode terminating the CLI instead of running as a shell command

entries.original: Fixed images sent to newer models being resized to 2576px per side instead of the correct 2000px maximum
entries.translated: Fixed images sent to newer models being resized to 2576px per side instead of the correct 2000px maximum

entries.original: Fixed remote control session idle status redrawing twice per second, which could flood `tmux -CC` control pipes and pause the terminal
entries.translated: Fixed remote control session idle status redrawing twice per second, which could flood `tmux -CC` control pipes and pause the terminal

entries.original: Fixed assistant messages appearing blank in some sessions due to a stale view preference
entries.translated: Fixed assistant messages appearing blank in some sessions due to a stale view preference

entries.original: Fixed a malformed hooks entry in `settings.json` no longer invalidating the entire file
entries.translated: Fixed a malformed hooks entry in `settings.json` no longer invalidating the entire file

entries.original: Voice mode: keybindings bound to Caps Lock now show an error since terminals don't deliver Caps Lock as a key event
entries.translated: Voice mode: keybindings bound to Caps Lock now show an error since terminals don't deliver Caps Lock as a key event
